backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the modern release flag.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' for cross-compilation and module path handling in newer JDKs; while not strictly a compile error on JDK 21, it is the required migration pattern for Java 21 projects.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin version to a newer snapshot compatible with Java 21.
